acceptance_criteria: Terminal states (Done, Cancelled) cannot transition backward without explicit reopen
InProgress requires Ready or Backlog as prior state
Paused flag clears when task leaves Blocked/OnHold status
Automated test coverage for all valid and invalid transitions
description: Task status transitions need stronger validation. TASK-046 (done) fixed the paused flag persisting after unblocking — apply_task_status now correctly clears paused, blocked_reason, blocked_at, blocked_phase, and blocked_by. Partial validation exists via validate_task_status_transition (blocks transitions out of Done/Cancelled terminal states). Remaining work (TASK-047, ready): enforce that InProgress requires Ready or Backlog as prior state, and add comprehensive automated test coverage for all valid/invalid transitions.
title: Enforce task lifecycle correctness and state machine guardrails
